name: Petite French Peas with Pineapple Mint
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Fresh petit pois or other sweet baby peas
Salt and white pepper to taste
Bouquet garni consisting of 1 sprig each pineapple mint, French thyme, and parsley
1 small head of butter lettuce, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a medium saucepan with a tight-fitting lid.
2. Add peas, onions, carrots, lemon juice, chicken stock, sugar, salt, pepper, and bouquet garni to the saucepan.
3. Stir well and cover with shredded lettuce.
4. Cover the pan and simmer for 30 to 45 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
5. Remove the bouquet garni, taste for seasoning, and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Sprinkle mint leaves over peas and serve immediately.
